title: Get Down on It
why_this_song: Get Down on It by Kool & the Gang (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "By standing on the wall?"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "If you really don't want to dance"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "If you really don't want to dance"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Baby, baby"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "If you really don't want to dance"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wall" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wall" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "really" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: If you really won't take a chance

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Get Down on It" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Get Down on It", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Get Down on It" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Get Down on It" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Get Down on It", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Get Down on It", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
